name: mojo-broadcast-edge-case-fix
description: Fix and test broadcast_to edge cases in Mojo tensor libraries: vacuous-loop dimension guard, 0-d scalars, identity, multi-axis, and ndim-reduction errors. Use when: (1) broadcast_to succeeds incorrectly for incompatible target shapes due to empty loop in are_shapes_broadcastable, (2) adding edge-case coverage for broadcasting 0-d tensors, identity broadcasts, or multi-axis expansion, (3) need to validate ndim reduction is properly rejected.
